sentences.english: Explain why you prefer it over other seasons.
My favorite season is autumn without a doubt.
sentences.korean: 의심의 여지 없이 가장 좋아하는 계절은 가을이에요.

sentences.english: First I love the comfortable temperature — not too hot and not too cold.
sentences.korean: 첫째 쾌적한 기온을 좋아해요 — 너무 덥지도 춥지도 않은.

sentences.english: It's the perfect weather for spending time outdoors without sweating or shivering.
sentences.korean: 땀을 흘리거나 떨지 않고 야외에서 시간을 보내기에 완벽한 날씨예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?

sentences.english: Second the scenery is absolutely breathtaking — the mountains covered in red orange and yellow leaves look like paintings.
sentences.korean: 둘째 풍경이 정말 숨이 멎을 정도예요 — 빨강 주황 노랑 잎으로 덮인 산이 그림처럼 보여요.

sentences.english: Finally autumn food is the best — roasted sweet potatoes and fresh apples are my favorites.
sentences.korean: 마지막으로 가을 음식이 최고예요 — 군고구마와 신선한 사과가 제일 좋아하는 거예요.

sentences.english: Autumn just makes everything feel warm and cozy.
sentences.korean: 가을은 모든 것을 따뜻하고 아늑하게 느끼게 해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Piece of Advice That Changed Your Life
